summary: MT5 multi-EA saturation scheduler hardened with orphan-dispatch recovery, production hourly wiring, regression fix for malformed dispatch_state handling, and deterministic test coverage (unit + integration-style).
notes: Production command path now includes orphan recovery flags in both cron/hourly_status.bat and routine_commands.json.
State normalization now safely resets unreadable/malformed dispatch_state content instead of failing the hourly run.
